info.name: Marriage Routes
info.attribution:
Layout, board, cards, design, player aid, coding, and library image by Jonathan Cox (email: Contact@GettingGames.com for inquiries) and released to the Public Domain under CC0.

The camels are modified from emojis whose attribution is in the About overlay.

The sound while changing turns is "Wrong Answer" by UNIVERSFIELD and is available under the Pixabay License at https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/wrong-answer-129254/.
info.description: Leverage marriages to send your camels to the best trade markets.
info.similarAwards:
2012 Hungarian Board Game Award Nominee
2010 Spiel des Jahres Recommended
2010 Meeples Choice Award Nominee
info.helpText:
Players take seats. Press the Setup button to begin. A random player (indicated by a button next to the seat area) is chosen to start.

Hover over "Game Rules" for an abridged version of the game rules.

Your hand of Good cards is shown under the bottom-left corner of the map, only you can see this information.

Modify money by left clicking on the number and then inputing changes into the prompt.

fields.label: Choose cursor style for all players.
Check this box and click the green button to reset the game.

changeRoutine.Note: DETERMINE IF USER HAS PRESSED THE ENTER KEY
If user has pressed Enter, do the thenRoutine; otherwise do nothing.
thenRoutine: var myChat = ${myChat} replace '\u000a' '' // Erase the carriage return.

thenRoutine.note: This stops an update print when resetting a SET counter

phase1.detail:
: If this icon is showing in the top right, that means at least one other player is modifying a value (not necessarily the same as you) at the same time. This does not affect your value changes, but a notice won't be added to the history until all players have closed the modify value window. Click on the icon to forcibly close the modify value window for all players except for yourself.

Update button: Closes this window and updates your values according to the input change. This change will not show up in the history box until all players have closed the modify value window.

Change by: You may type a positive or negative value here, and this difference will automatically apply to the 'Set to' value next to it.

Set Total to: You may type any value here to indicate the total value, and this will automatically calculate the difference and show this as the 'Change by' value next to it.

+/- buttons: Click these buttons to add or subtract 1/5 value from the 'Set Total to' & 'Change by' values.

thenRoutine: // MAKE ALL RESOURCE TYPE WIDGETS HIDDEN
